---
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

<script>
(function () {
    var path = window.location.pathname;
    // detect /en/ or /zh/ in the path to pick the right 404
    var m = path.match(/^(.*?)\/(en|zh)(\/.*)?$/);
    if (m) {
        window.location.replace(m[1] + '/' + m[2] + '/404.html');
    } else {
        // not under en/ or zh/ – default to en
        var base = path.split('/').slice(0, -1).join('/');
        window.location.replace((base || '') + '/en/404.html');
    }
})();
</script>

<noscript>
Page not found. Visit the <a href="en/">English site</a> or <a href="zh/">Chinese site</a>.
</noscript>
